net.sf.saxon.trans

Class PackageLibrary

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.sf.saxon.trans.PackageLibrary

  • public class PackageLibrary
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Detail

      • PackageLibrary

        public PackageLibrary()

    • Method Detail

      • addPackage

        public void addPackage(java.lang.String name,
              StylesheetPackage packageIn)
        Add a package to the current library with the given name

        Packages which have the same name and version to one already within the library are considered to be duplicates and are not added.

        Parameters:
        name - The name to use for this package
        packageIn - The stylesheet package to be added

      • getPackage

        public StylesheetPackage getPackage(java.lang.String name,
                           PackageVersionRanges ranges)
        Return the first package from the library that has the given name and whose version lies in the given ranges
        Parameters:
        name - The name of the package
        ranges - The ranges of versions of that package that are acceptable
        Returns:
        The first package that meets the criteria, or null if none can be found

      • getPackage

        public StylesheetPackage getPackage(java.lang.String name)
        Return the latest version of a package of the given name from the library.

        The definition of 'latest' is determined by partial ordering of the PackageVersion class

        Parameters:
        name - The name of the package to be returned
        Returns:
        The version of the named package whose version orders highest, or null if no such package exists

      • size

        public int size(java.lang.String name)
